title: 'Ephrathiy #0673
definition:
Ephrathite = "ashiness: fruitfulness"

 1) an inhabitant or descendant of Ephraim
 2) an inhabitant of Bethlehem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ephrathite = "ashiness: fruitfulness"

 1) an inhabitant or descendant of Ephraim
 2) an inhabitant of Bethlehem

    NASB:  a desc. of Ephraim, also an inhab. of Ephrath
